title: [Cobblemon] Salt's Dumb Megas
description: Cobblemon add-on for my dumb ideas and slightly less dumb ideas.
body:
# Welcome to my brain children :3
This here is the dumping ground for anything I decide to make.
And since 90% of what I wanna make is megas it's called Salt's Megas.
Obviously you'll need cobblemon and megashowdown installed.
Also just like every other Cobblemon add-on, just drop this into the data and resource pack folders :3


## How to get the Mega Stones!

All my Mega Stones use the bellow format for their crafting Recipes, with the only differanc
between them being what item you need to place in the top middle slot.

![Diamond at bottom middle. Iron Ingots left and right middle, with a blank Mega Stone between them. And in the top middle the pokemon spesfic Item!.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08fb9e1cf77b222f8dbd0926e2c1c4fe387f4e06.png)

## Recipe Items
These are the Items you will place in the top middle slot along with the above Recipe to create each Mega Stone!!

-Porygon-Z : Dubious Disc

-Unown : Psychic Seeds

## Other Stuff :3
-Cosmetic skin for Ursaring if Totem of Undying is used on it.

## P.S
Also check out "[Cobblemon] Presi's Mega Emporium" by _presii!!
They happened to be making a Mega Porygon-Z at the same time as me and also helped me when I got stuck with something! Their help has been Incredibly... well helpful!
